allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from tests.conftest import *; print\('conftest imports successfully'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; print\('sys.path before conftest:', sys.path[:3]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; import os; sys.path.insert\(0, os.path.dirname\(os.path.dirname\(os.path.abspath\('tests/conftest.py'\)\)\)\); print\('Added to sys.path:', sys.path[0]\); import app; print\('Successfully imported app module'\)")
